name: writing-engine-benchmark
description: Frozen benchmark for the Writing Engine. Three source-grounded decision-memo tasks share one feed scope so a lesson learned on one task is expected to help the others. Task 3 is HELD OUT: the engine never extracts lessons from it, so any improvement on task 3 across cycles must come from lessons learned on tasks 1 and 2 — a guard against prompt/benchmark overfitting. Do not edit after a baseline is recorded; bump `version` and re-baseline instead.

event.title: Benchmark: district enrollment shift
event.body: Frozen benchmark record describing an enrollment shift and a change in the count of districts flagged for chronic absenteeism.

event.title: Benchmark: transit on-time performance change
event.body: Frozen benchmark record describing a change in on-time performance and the number of routes flagged for chronic delay.

event.title: Benchmark (held out): air-quality index change
event.body: Frozen held-out benchmark record describing an air-quality index change and the number of monitors flagged above threshold.
